steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Ischia is described as a complex volcano made of multiple volcanic centers, while Mount Vsevidof is about to be described next. The opening statement says “not all volcanoes are the same,” so the transition must signal how these two examples differ.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
“in contrast” signals that Mount Vsevidof is being presented as different from Ischia.

The other three—“in any case,” “in fact,” and “in conclusion”—either suggest the point stands regardless, provide supporting detail, or mark a conclusion rather than a comparison.

That matches Choice B — in contrast,.
